work_unit: deep-audit: server + routes + social-scraper + XHS posting pipeline + cookie keepalive + mail push + cache + storage (12 files)

action: Full deep audit of sunset-prediction. Read 12 source files across server entry, API routes, SQLite storage, Weibo/XHS social scraper, Browser Use auto-posting agent, cookie keepalive, mail push, cache layer. outcome_evidence: audit-2026-07-06-020.md written (14 findings, 10 route-fix + 1 direction-shift + 2 structural debt enumerated). audit-cycle-state.json updated to fix-in-progress with 11 derived_fixes registered. next_suggestion: Dispatch H-001 shell injection fix (server.js exec→execFile) as route-fix case
Dispatch H-004 API auth middleware as route-fix case (highest impact finding)
Dispatch H-002 .env atomic write fix (xhs_keepalive.py) as route-fix case

audit_findings.finding: Shell injection surface: execAsync interpolates BROWSER_USE_POST_LIMIT into shell command without sanitization
audit_findings.remediation: Replace exec with execFile/spawn array args

audit_findings.finding: Non-atomic write to .env containing all credentials — crash during write corrupts file
audit_findings.remediation: Write temp + os.replace() atomic rename + flock

audit_findings.finding: Indirect prompt injection: untrusted post content passed as Browser Use Agent task description to LLM
audit_findings.remediation: Input sanitization + URL allowlist + relative paths

audit_findings.finding: No authentication on any API endpoint; POST endpoints trigger expensive scraping/screenshot operations
audit_findings.remediation: Add bearer token auth + rate limiting + bind 127.0.0.1

audit_findings.finding: Desktop WEIBO_COOKIE unnecessarily sent to m.weibo.cn mobile API
console.error may leak secrets via error messages from Playwright/fetch
SSE social/fetch doesn't abort fetchAndStoreSocialData on client disconnect
TTLCache never evicts stale entries — memory grows monotonically
audit_findings.remediation: Add LRU eviction or periodic sweep + maxEntries

audit_findings.finding: storage_state JSON with cookies written at default 0644 permissions
Custom .env parser diverges from Python parsers (quoting, encoding)
SMTP_PASS read from os.environ visible in /proc/pid/environ
